summary: 2026-07-15 16:20 PDT — The implementation satisfies the substantive acceptance criteria, but the branch violates the spec’s explicit scope-containment criterion by adding an unlisted approach-review artifact.

findings.title: Approach artifact violates scope containment
findings.claim: This file is added by the branch, but AC7 permits only AGENTS.md, BACKLOG.md, tests/reviewer_test.sh, reviews/antipattern-lens.md, and reviews/antipattern-lens.design.json. The six-file diff therefore directly violates an acceptance criterion.
findings.suggestion: Either remove this artifact before merge or amend AC7 to explicitly exempt the workflow-generated design, approach, and correctness review artifacts, consistent with the convention documented in reviews/pluggable-reviewer.md.
